control_awareness: The amount requires department head approval due to the amount threshold rule (P2P-C-001). The requester cannot self-approve (P2P-C-002), and pre-PO approval is required before order issuance (P2P-C-003).
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will trigger department head approval, ensuring compliance with amount-based approval control and segregation of duties. Pre-PO approval will be enforced before issuing the purchase order.
overall_reason: Creating a single purchase request for the full amount is the most efficient and compliant approach to secure approval in time before the quarter-end budget deadline. It respects all enforced controls and aligns with requester objectives to minimize avoidable approval lead time and use the available budget within allowed actions.
reason: The total purchase amount exceeds the manager approval threshold of 1,000,000, so a single purchase request for the full amount should be created to proceed with department head approval. This aligns with the need to use the remaining quarterly budget before the period closes and avoids unnecessary splitting of the request.
